Spring Hill Home Loans

FHA loans in Spring Hill, Florida

Spring Hill anchors Hernando County on Florida's Nature Coast, north of Tampa Bay, and is known for its affordability and abundant single-family homes. That value makes FHA especially powerful here — the statewide loan limit covers homes with room to spare, and 3.5% down opens the door for first-time buyers, retirees, and families seeking lower prices than the Tampa metro.

Hernando County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Spring Hill

With the 2026 FHA limit of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Spring Hill home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Spring Hill's very affordable market, that covers virtually all homes for sale. A few Florida counties are set higher, so confirm Hernando County's exact figure with HUD.

Affordable Nature Coast homeownership with FHA

Spring Hill offers some of the best home values in the greater Tampa Bay region, well within FHA's loan limit — ideal for first-time buyers and those on a budget. Older homes that need updates can be financed with an FHA 203(k) renovation loan, and you can pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds to minimize your cash to close.

Down payment help for Spring Hill buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Spring Hill buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Hernando County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Spring Hill

We help buyers throughout Spring Hill and Hernando County, including Timber Pines, Sterling Hill, and the surrounding Nature Coast communities. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Spring Hill (Hernando County) for 2026?+
Hernando County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers virtually all Spring Hill homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Spring Hill a good FHA market?+
Yes — it's one of the most affordable markets near Tampa Bay, so FHA's loan limit stretches far here.
How much home can I buy with FHA in Spring Hill?+
With the $541,287 limit and 3.5% down, you can finance a home up to roughly $560,000 — far above the typical Spring Hill price.
How much down payment do I need in Spring Hill?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Hernando County?+
Yes — Spring Hill, Brooksville, Weeki Wachee, and surrounding communities.
